description: lq-maintainer-agent §2.1 safety floor — PreToolUse hook registration for the plugin path. Auto-discovered at the plugin root (hooks/hooks.json); the hook body lives at settings/hooks/block-writes.sh and, per v0.6, enforces an ALLOW-LIST of read-only gh subcommands (gh api non-GET denied by default) plus the git push / PR-ref-checkout / alias-laundering blocks. This file carries ONLY the hooks block (no permissions key — plugins cannot inject permission rules); keep it in sync with the hooks block in settings/claude-settings.json, the reference copy lq-ai vendors into its own .claude/ for non-plugin sessions (M0). Known limits of hook enforcement are documented in settings/README.md and design §10.1 — in particular, no hook runs under --dangerously-skip-permissions, which onboarding forbids for triage sessions. Changes here are §3.6 permission-bearing: two maintainer reviews, CODEOWNERS-routed.
